summary: Iteration 59: Complete PMS (Property Management System) testing. All 17 backend API tests passed. All 14 frontend tests passed. Features tested: PMS Dashboard with stat cards, tabs, reservation lists, check-in/check-out buttons, Room Management page with CRUD operations, reservation detail modal with edit functionality, hotel selector, and sidebar navigation.
passed_tests: Backend - test_login_with_agency_credentials: Agency login (agent@acenta.test / agent123) works
Backend - test_pms_dashboard_requires_auth: PMS dashboard requires authentication (401/403)
Backend - test_get_dashboard: GET /api/agency/pms/dashboard returns stats (arrivals, in_house, departures, occupancy)
Backend - test_dashboard_with_hotel_filter: Dashboard with hotel_id filter works
Backend - test_get_arrivals: GET /api/agency/pms/arrivals returns today's arrivals list
Backend - test_get_in_house: GET /api/agency/pms/in-house returns in-house guests
Backend - test_get_departures: GET /api/agency/pms/departures returns departures list
Backend - test_get_reservations: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations returns reservations
Backend - test_get_reservations_with_filters: Reservations with limit filter works
Backend - test_list_rooms: GET /api/agency/pms/rooms returns rooms list
Backend - test_create_room: POST /api/agency/pms/rooms creates room / handles duplicate
Backend - test_update_room: PUT /api/agency/pms/rooms/{id} updates room
Backend - test_delete_test_room: DELETE /api/agency/pms/rooms/{id} deletes room
Backend - test_check_in_reservation: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-in works
Backend - test_check_out_reservation: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-out works
Backend - test_update_reservation_details: PUT /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} updates flight/tour info
Backend - test_get_single_reservation: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} returns single reservation
Frontend - PMS Dashboard page loads (data-testid='pms-dashboard')
Frontend - Stat cards found: Girisler, Otelde, Cikislar, Doluluk
Frontend - PMS tabs found: arrivals, in-house, departures, reservations
Frontend - Check-in buttons (Giris) visible on arrival reservations
Frontend - Check-out buttons (Cikis) visible on in-house reservations
Frontend - Room Management page loads (data-testid='pms-rooms-page')
Frontend - Add Room button found (data-testid='add-room-btn')
Frontend - 8 room cards displayed, grouped by floor
Frontend - Room form dialog opens with room_number field
Frontend - PMS sidebar navigation: PMS Paneli, Oda Yonetimi links present
Frontend - Reservation detail modal opens on row click
Frontend - Edit button (Duzenle) in detail modal works
Frontend - Edit mode shows fields: guest-name, arrival-flight, tour-operator
Frontend - Hotel selector found on PMS Dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All PMS API endpoints properly secured with AgencyDep (agency_admin, agency_agent, admin, super_admin roles)
Good: MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses via _serialize_reservation and _serialize_room helpers
Good: Check-in/check-out logic handles edge cases (already checked in, already checked out, cancelled)
Good: Room CRUD prevents deletion of occupied rooms (status 409)
Good: Duplicate room number validation per hotel (status 409)
Good: Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Good: PMS Dashboard has stat cards, tabs, reservation list, and check-in/check-out buttons
Good: Room Management displays rooms grouped by floor with CRUD operations
Good: Reservation detail modal shows guest info, flight info, tour info, and price
Good: Edit mode provides fields for updating reservation details (guest, flight, tour, notes)
Good: Hotel selector dropdown filters dashboard and lists by hotel
seed_data_creation: Test data includes 5+ PMS reservations with different statuses (arrival, in_house, checked_out) and 8 rooms (101-103, 201-203, 301-302) grouped by floor. Hotel ID: 388979be-4040-44e3-8779-533467a870cb
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified PMS features: (1) PMS Dashboard at /app/agency/pms - stat cards (Girisler, Otelde, Cikislar, Doluluk), tabs, reservation lists with check-in/check-out buttons. (2) Room Management at /app/agency/pms/rooms - rooms grouped by floor, CRUD operations. (3) Reservation detail modal with edit mode for flight/tour info. All APIs under /api/agency/pms/* are working. Working credentials: agent@acenta.test / agent123. PMS modules (pms_paneli, oda_yonetimi) are in agency's allowed_modules.

mocked_apis.notes: All PMS APIs return real data from MongoDB. No mocked endpoints.
